flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Nevada-Las Vegas rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $9.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Nevada-Las Vegas rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.8k → $27.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Nevada-Las Vegas fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Nevada-Las Vegas rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 (19.4% → 26.5%).
